final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a cross-border e-commerce promotional campaign, designed for advertising purposes, in a 16:9 landscape format.

Style/medium: bold graphic design poster with layered typographic art, editorial commercial style with rich visual complexity — structured, not chaotic
Composition: 16:9 horizontal layout, multi-layer depth with foreground product overlapping background type stacks, strong visual hierarchy guiding the eye from headline to product to CTA
Subject: hero product (e-commerce merchandise) placed prominently in the foreground, partially obscuring stacked letterforms behind it, creating a sense of depth and dimensionality
Scene/backdrop: dynamic promotional background with dense typographic layers — stacked oversized display fonts, decorative art lettering, and promotional copy arranged in rhythmic tiers
Lighting/mood: vibrant, high-energy commercial mood; directional light on the product to separate it from the typographic backdrop; energetic and aspirational
Color palette: bold primary accent color (e.g. electric red or vivid orange) as the promotional anchor, contrasted with deep navy or black background, white and gold as secondary type colors
Materials/textures: glossy product surface catching light, matte paper-like texture on typographic layers, subtle grain overlay to unify the composition
Text (verbatim): 艺术字 stacked across multiple typographic layers in the background, partially masked by the foreground product
Constraints: typographic stacking must be intentional and legible in hierarchy — not random; product must visually "break out" in front of at least one layer of text; overall composition must feel complex yet organized, with clear focal point
Avoid: clip-art product images, random color scatter, illegible type pile-ups, generic Alibaba/Taobao banner clichés, flat uninspired layout, watermarks
